dsVert 1.1.0
  • Reference

Append an age-quartile factor column (test helper)

Source: R/dsvertTestHelpersDS.R
dsvertAddQuartileColumnDS.Rd

Compute quartile boundaries of the named column (defaulting to age) and attach a factor column with levels Q1..Q4. Used to validate ds.vertChisqCross.

Usage

dsvertAddQuartileColumnDS(data_name, column = "age", output_column = "age_q")

Arguments

data_name

Character. Name of the data frame symbol on the server.

column

Character. Name of an existing column to operate on.

output_column

Character. Name of the new column to add to the data frame.

On this page
